name_cn:
Overseas Original N60742
Exclusive real photos! Clemence Wallet, compact yet surprisingly spacious, made of exquisite and durable Monogram canvas. Bright lining and leather zipper, highlighting a playful feminine charm. Dimensions: 19.5×9×1.5cm
